NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, ERNEST KANE, ROBERT FREDERICK ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERNEST MOORE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ERNEST MOORE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF ERNEST MOORE ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, ERNEST
